name: getChatAdministrators
description: Use this method to get a list of administrators in a chat

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel in the format @username

parameters.name: return_bots
parameters.description: Pass True to additionally receive all bots that are administrators of the chat. By default, bots other than the current bot are omitted.
